evidence.source_text: Machine learning engineer with 5.3 years of experience building ML-powered features in production.

evidence.claim: Shipped RAG-based feature and owns the evaluation framework
evidence.source_text: Recently, I shipped our first RAG-based feature this year and now own the eval framework for it.

evidence.claim: Evolved ranking layer from hand-tuned scoring to learning-to-rank model
evidence.source_text: Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product, evolving it from a hand-tuned scoring function to a learning-to-rank model over 9 months.

evidence.claim: Improved revenue-per-search by 12% via ranking model
Developed semantic search for 500K document knowledge base
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents.

evidence.claim: Improved search-relevance by 35% over Elasticsearch BM25
evidence.source_text: Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup

evidence.claim: Used sentence-transformers and FAISS for semantic search
evidence.source_text: Used sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2 initially, later upgraded to bge-base) with FAISS for fast nearest-neighbor retrieval.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes evaluation rigor and offline benchmarks
evidence.source_text: I care a lot about evaluation rigor — too many teams ship models without offline benchmarks they trust.

evidence.claim: Values practical experience over academic theory
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Experience with Feature Engineering, SAP, CNN, Milvus, Embeddings, Recommendation Systems, Vector Search, Haystack, Learning to Rank, Elasticsearch, FastAPI, Forecasting
evidence.source_text: Skills: Feature Engineering... SAP... CNN... Milvus... Embeddings... Recommendation Systems... Vector Search... Haystack... Learning to Rank... Elasticsearch... FastAPI... Forecasting
